characters.appearance: Black male, bald, full black beard. Mid-30s, solid build.
characters.wardrobe: Dark blue puffer vest over a light grey long-sleeve shirt. Wearing a black seatbelt.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: आप English बोलते हो? [Do you speak English?]
Character B says: हाँ। [Yes.]
Character A says: क्या मैं आपके साथ अपनी English practice कर सकता हूँ? [Is it okay if I practice my English with you?]
Character B says: हाँ, बिल्कुल। [Yes, absolutely.]
Character B says: आप कब से सीख रहे हो? [How long have you been learning?]
Character A says: करीब पांच महीने से। [For about five months.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Establishes the real-world context of a passenger practicing English with a driver.
- Hooks the viewer with a relatable, slightly vulnerable request to practice speaking.
- Sets up the timeline of the user's learning journey.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Speaking English confidently because I started using Supernova instead of just reading grammar books
Do you speak English?
आप English बोलते हो?
Yes.
हाँ।
Is it okay if I practice my English with you?
क्या मैं आपके साथ अपनी English practice कर सकता हूँ?
Yes, absolutely.
हाँ, बिल्कुल।
How long have you been learning?
आप कब से सीख रहे हो?
For about five months.
करीब पांच महीने से।

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: पर आपकी English तो बहुत अच्छी है। [But your English is very good.]
Character A says: सच में? [Really?]
Character B says: हाँ, मुझे लगा आप सालों से बोल रहे हो! [Yes, I thought you'd been speaking for years!]
Character B says: आप किसके साथ practice करते हो? [Who do you practice with?]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers the emotional payoff of the ad: validation from a fluent speaker.
- Builds the main character's confidence, reinforcing the app's effectiveness.
- Transitions into the product reveal by asking about their practice method.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Speaking English confidently because I started using Supernova instead of just reading grammar books
But your English is very good.
पर आपकी English तो बहुत अच्छी है।
Really?
सच में?
Yes, I thought you'd been speaking for years!
हाँ, मुझे लगा आप सालों से बोल रहे हो!
Who do you practice with?
आप किसके साथ practice करते हो?

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: मैं Supernova app use कर रहा हूँ। [I have been using the Supernova app.]
Character A says: इसमें एक AI tutor है। [It has an AI tutor.]
Character A says: जिससे मैं real-life situations की practice करता हूँ। [With which I practice real-life situations.]
Character B says: अच्छा। [I see.]
Character A says: बिना किसी hesitation के। [Without any hesitation.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Introduces Supernova as the practical solution to the user's speaking problem.
- Highlights key brand features: AI tutor and real-life situation practice.
- Emphasizes the emotional benefit of practicing without hesitation or judgment.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Speaking English confidently because I started using Supernova instead of just reading grammar books
I have been using the Supernova app.
मैं Supernova app use कर रहा हूँ।
It has an AI tutor.
इसमें एक AI tutor है。
With which I practice real-life situations.
जिससे मैं real-life situations की practice करता हूँ।
I see.
अच्छा।
Without any hesitation.
बिना किसी hesitation के।

scenes.scene_summary:
- Provides a clear final brand impression.
- Acts as the visual call-to-action to download the app.
